warnings: This contract is not a model/API extraction engine.
Generated candidates must not finalize Toma fate, brass moth truth, or Council motive.
Timeline candidates must not become fixed chronology automatically.
Profile candidates may remain ghost nodes.
Visual asset candidates are placeholders and not release assets.
unknownFieldsPolicy: Preserve unknown imported top-level fields under metadata.importedUnknownFields and keep unrecognized extraction fields visible in JSON review.
humanAuthorityBoundaries: Freeform user review is the source of truth.
No publishing, database persistence, production sync, model/API call, or AI video generation is introduced by this contract.
notes: The contract prepares an adapter target for future extraction while preserving the current Visual Review Hub, Claim Ledger, Timeline View, Profile/Ghost Flow, local persistence, JSON import/export, and decision log behavior.
